title: Ka Gayyata, A Biya Ka
description: Ka sami aƙalla kashi 10% na kuɗin da abokanka ke biya. Kana iya samun har $1,000 a wata.

hero.lifetimeLabel: Abin da ka samu ya zuwa yanzu

code.title: Hanyar gayyatarka
code.subtitle: Raba hanyarka ko lambarka. Duk wanda ya yi rajista da ita zai haɗu da kai.
code.shareTitle: Ka haɗu da ni a MoolaHub
code.shareText: Yi ajiya da USDC ka shiga da'irorin ajiya a MoolaHub. Yi amfani da hanyata don farawa:
code.editHint: Zaɓi haruffa ko lambobi 4 zuwa 15. Wannan shi ne abin da abokai za su rubuta don shiga ta gare ka.
code.confirmBody: Tsohuwar lambarka za ta daina aiki nan take. Duk wanda har yanzu yake da tsohuwar hanyarka ba za a ƙidaya shi a matsayin gayyatarka ba.

errors.format: Yi amfani da haruffa ko lambobi 4 zuwa 15, ba tare da fili ba.

tier.title: Matakin samun ribarka
tier.subtitle: Yawan masu ajiya masu aiki da ka gayyata, shi ke ƙara kason ka na kuɗin sabis.
tier.progressToNext: Sauran masu ajiya masu aiki {{count}} don kaiwa {{tier}}
tier.maxed: Ka kai matakin ƙarshe, mafi girman kaso na {{rate}}%.

withdraw.title: Cire riba
withdraw.subtitle: Tura kwamishanka zuwa walat ɗinka.
withdraw.success: Cirewar tana kan hanya zuwa walat ɗinka.
withdraw.monthly: An cire {{used}} daga {{cap}} a wannan watan

locked.title: Cirewa na buɗewa a {{min}}
locked.monthlyReached: Ka kai iyakarka ta {{cap}} a wannan watan. Yana sake farawa a ranar 1.

errors.max: Za ka iya cire {{amount}} kaɗai a yanzu.
errors.monthly: Wannan zai wuce iyakar watanka na {{cap}}. Kana da {{amount}} da ya rage a wannan watan.

referrals.title: Gayyatarka
referrals.subtitle: Duk wanda ka kawo MoolaHub.
referrals.empty: Babu gayyata tukuna. Raba hanyarka don fara samun riba.

share.title: Aika lambar gayyatarka
share.desc: Raba lambarka ko hanyarka da abokai da dangi don su shiga MoolaHub.

save.title: Bar su su yi ajiya
save.desc: Idan sun yi rajista suka ci gaba da ajiya, kana samun kaso na kuɗin da suke biya. Yawan ajiyar da suke yi, shi ke ƙara maka riba.

earn.title: Karɓi ribarka
earn.desc: Ka riƙe aƙalla kashi {{rate}}% na waɗannan kuɗin, har $1,000 a wata.

limits.note: Cirewa: mafi ƙaranci {{min}} kowace cirewa, har zuwa {{max}} a kowane wata.

signup.invited: An yi amfani da gayyata. Kana shiga ta hannun aboki.
